full: Ieb-0-3 _ Carat 1 bppltradns duck, Nos 8560/3 Sete Code brent CFEF ig taty fe Final Diagnosis Breast{ left, wide local excision: Infilt ductal carcinoma, Nottingham grade If (of Ill) [tubules 3/3, nuclei 2/3, mitoses 2/3; Nottingham score 7/9], forming a mass (1.9 x 1.8 x 1.2. em) {AJC pTic]. Ductal carcinoma in situ, intermediate nuclear grade, comprises approximately 5- 25% of tumor volume (including the ductal carcinoma in situ, the tumor is 2.1 em, in greatest dimension). Al surgical resection margins, including the separately submitted re-excision of the medial margin, are negative for tumor (minimum tumor free margin, 0.5 em, deep and inferior margin).
